name: dreaded-apes-wallet
description: Dreaded Apes Wallet, an installable multichain media vault with a standalone transaction guard.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/sw.js && node --check public/install/install.js && node --check public/guard/dreaded-guard.js && node --check public/guard/demo.js && node --check scripts/sync-guard-package.js && node --check scripts/build-extension.js
